# Carbonate Production

**Summary**: The rate at which carbonate minerals are precipitated in a marine environment.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] quantified carbonate production to model the Marrat Formation's evolution.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] Used to model the growth of carbonate structures.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] Modeled based on depth and environmental factors.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Carbonate mud had production rates of 25-80 m/Ma. ([[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024, p. 59]])
